prestazioni: Engine swap to a 4B11T (from Lancer Ralliart/Evo X) with forged internals (JE 87mm pistons, Eagle H-beam rods, ACL race bearings) and a Garrett GTX3076R turbo (0.82 A/R turbine housing) running 28psi on E85, paired with a Tomei 272° camshaft kit and a custom ECU tune by Haltech Elite 2500 with flex-fuel sensor integration

Full drivetrain reinforcement: Cusco 1.5-way LSD for the FWD models (or a CUSCO 2-way LSD for AWD variants), PTT short shifter with carbon fiber shift knob, and a Sachs Performance dual-mass flywheel with uprated clutch (specifically the Sachs Performance 3000950001 for 4B11/4B12 engines)

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (MITSUBISHI ASX-specific valving), Whiteline 24mm adjustable front sway bar (PN: BSR75XZ), and SuperPro poly bushings (full kit PN: SPF0115K) for subframe and control arms, paired with Project Mu 883 ceramic brake pads and DBA 5000 Series slotted rotors (front: 336mm, rear: 300mm)
estetica: Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (ASX-specific, PN: RB-WB-001) with custom carbon fiber overfenders, paired with a custom front splitter by Seibon Carbon (ASX-specific, 3-piece design with adjustable canards) and a custom 3D-printed rear diffuser by 3D Carbon (integrated with dual 3.5" exhaust tips from HKS Hi-Power)

Full custom livery by Avery Dennison (Mitsubishi Racing Lancer Evolution-inspired, matte black base with neon green and white accents, including a custom "4B11T" badge on the hood and rear quarter panels), paired with Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (18x9.5 +35 offset, matte gunmetal finish) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (245/40/18)

Interior overhaul with Bride Zeta III bucket seats (ASX-specific mounting brackets, PN: BR-001-ASX), Takata Drift Series 4-point harnesses, and a custom carbon fiber dashboard overlay by Varis (ASX-specific, including a relocated gauge cluster with Defi Advance BF gauges for boost, oil temp, and EGT), paired with a NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel hub and a Momo Mod.78 wheel (330mm, suede)
